testcase.name: test_upload_png_success

failure.message: AssertionError: Cache header missing: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate assert ('max-age' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate') + where 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff0c8ae66a90>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff0c8ae66a90> = 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'.lower

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_blog_iter9.py:216: in test_upload_png_success assert "max-age" in cc.lower() and "immutable" in cc.lower(), f"Cache header missing: {cc}" E AssertionError: Cache header missing: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate E assert ('max-age' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate') E + where 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff0c8ae66a90>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff0c8ae66a90> = 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'.lower
